settings.heading: Help Centre
settings.text: Find practical support guidance for orders, purchases, Business Health Check, Core Services, Business NBN, membership, marketplace pathways and contacting RBP.

settings.heading: Common support areas
settings.text: Use these topics to decide what information to include when contacting support.

settings.title: Account access
settings.text: Include the email address used with RBP, the access issue and any order or membership context.

settings.title: Orders and purchases
settings.text: Include the order number, product or service name, delivery issue and preferred contact method.

settings.title: Business Health Check
settings.text: Include the business context, the issue you want reviewed and any deadlines or constraints.

settings.title: Core Services
settings.text: Include the service being considered, current business problem and whether you need advice, intake or delivery support.

settings.title: Business NBN support
settings.text: Include the business address, current service status, provider if known, activation timing, preferred contact method and urgent operational constraints.

settings.title: Membership
settings.text: Ask RBP to confirm current membership availability, inclusions, application steps and support pathways.

settings.title: Marketplace and partner offers
settings.text: Partner offers are subject to partner terms, eligibility and availability. RBP does not guarantee offer access or approval.

settings.title: Contact and support
settings.text: Use contact support when the correct product, service, marketplace pathway or next step is unclear.

settings.heading: Support questions
settings.text: These answers provide a clean fallback while Help Centre metaobject articles are populated in Shopify Admin.

settings.question: What should I include in a support request?
settings.answer: Include the business context, order or product details, timeline, preferred contact method and the outcome you need.

settings.question: What should I include for Business NBN support?
settings.answer: Include the business address, current service status, provider if known, activation timing, preferred contact method and any urgent operational constraints. Final serviceability, technology type, speed and activation timing must be confirmed before relying on a plan.

settings.question: Are marketplace offers guaranteed?
settings.answer: No. Partner offers, funding pathways, insurance quotes and NBN pathways may depend on eligibility, availability, provider terms and final review.
